response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience with notable geospatial background through GISCollective and Green Map, plus high-throughput low-latency work in DLang at Sociomantic which is conceptually adjacent to the role. However, modern C++ experience is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments around 2014-2015, and there is no Rust experience. C++ is not listed in the skills section. Worth a screening call to gauge whether DLang systems experience and GIS domain interest translate to the C++ routing-tile pipeline work, but the core language requirement is a real gap.
strengths: Genuine geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Open Green Map
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience in DLang at Sociomantic (async I/O, fibers, caching)
Long senior-level track record with strong testing/TDD discipline and open-source contributions
concerns: No recent modern C++ commercial experience; C++ absent from listed skills
No Rust experience as an acceptable alternative
No prior work on navigation/routing systems or production routing data pipelines
